title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Holdem, Unknown person #15, Tama as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tama is that kid that Master Holder Caught!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I dare you to try and take her back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop spacing out. I'm not going to watch your back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Call him out here right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Slice through them if you want to save Tama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I do want to save her!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you don't call your boss over here, none of you are getting out of this alive.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you've done anything to TAMA. I'll never forgive you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're looking for the boss... here I am!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you destroy my house with all of your Sumo wrestling....!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't really have a choice, did it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Urashima flew towards us... and now my house is in ruins!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What role did you people crawl out of!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You lot who are pointing your swords this way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you subordinates of that thief, SHUTEN- MARU!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess you want to rescue this kid, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd suggest not moving another inch!! I can crush her with these jaws at a moment's notice!!

dialogue.speaker: Holdem
dialogue.text: As of now, Master Holdem is...

dialogue.speaker: Basil Hawkins
dialogue.text: Captain... Basil Hawkins just arrived at the entrance.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And there's a fire raging through the town.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm going to save you now, Tama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't plan on returning her, you dumbass!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 49 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
